issues.description: BDD oracle shows 0 scenarios passed, 0 failed, 2 pending. Both scenarios tagged @task:TASK-RIP-001 are in PENDING state with traceback errors, not passing. Scenarios: (1) test_a_run_over_an_empty_corpus_publishes_nothing_and_completes_cleanly, (2) test_a_pathtraversal_filename_in_the_corpus_cannot_make_the_pipeline_read_outside_the_corpus_root. Pending step: 'All traceback entries are hidden. Pass --full-trace to see hidden and internal frames.'
issues.suggestion: Investigate why the BDD scenarios are pending/erroring. Run with --full-trace to see the actual error. These are pipeline integration tests - ensure all required components (walker, publisher, pipeline orchestration) are wired together correctly.

issues.description: Player's turn 2 report lists 6 files as modified that show no changes per git status. Files: coverage_task_rip_001.json, coverage_task_rip_001_full.json, src/fleet_memory/reindex/__init__.py, src/fleet_memory/reindex/walker.py, src/fleet_memory/settings.py, tests/unit/reindex/test_walker.py. These were modified in turn 1, not turn 2.
issues.suggestion: Fix the report writer to only include files actually modified in the current turn, not cumulative changes. Exclude orchestrator-managed paths under .guardkit/autobuild/ and tasks/.

criteria_verification.notes: Both src/fleet_memory/reindex/__init__.py and src/fleet_memory/reindex/walker.py exist and are committed per evidence bundle.
walk_corpus function has correct signature and behavior. Unit test test_walk_corpus_yields_markdown_documents passes in independent verification.

Security invariant verified by passing unit tests: test_path_traversal_entry_not_read and test_symlink_escape_not_read both pass. However, BDD scenario for pipeline-level path-traversal protection is PENDING.
Empty corpus handling verified by passing unit test test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing. BDD scenario for pipeline-level empty corpus handling is PENDING.
corpus_root field confirmed in Settings with FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix per evidence bundle.
tests/unit/reindex/test_walker.py contains and passes both required tests: test_path_traversal_entry_not_read and test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing, plus additional coverage.
All quality gates passed per evidence bundle. Ruff lint checks pass with Python 3.14 compatibility.

rationale: Unit tests for the walker component all pass (5/5) and verify all acceptance criteria. However, the BDD oracle shows 0 scenarios completed (0 passed, 0 failed, 2 pending). Per ZERO-CARDINALITY BDD GUARD: when scenarios_attempted = 0, this is ABSENT SIGNAL and approval cannot be based on absence of failure. The pending BDD scenarios suggest pipeline integration issues that must be resolved before the task is complete. The walker component itself appears correct, but the pipeline integration verification has not succeeded.
